title: Drastic Rework Proposal: unimem v2 — from storage facade to cognitive memory engine
summary: Architecture rationale and evidence base arguing to evolve unimem v1's storage facade into a layered cognitive memory engine feeding memspine.
notes: Status: Draft v3, self-described as 'architecture rationale' (context), while structure-plan is the buildable blueprint. Contains a decision register (D-26..D-35) which gives an ADR-like signal, but it is a multi-decision proposal document, not a single locked ADR; the decisions are meant to slot into the structure plan's register. Classified DOC as context/rationale; synthesizer may wish to note the embedded proposed decisions.
